description: Validates that p-for has higher precedence than p-if on the same element, and warns when source order is confusing.

diagnostics.messageContains: `p-if` is written before `p-for`, but `p-for` always has the highest precedence
Elements with 'p-for' directives should have a unique 'p-key' binding for efficient updates

assertNodes.description: The p-if directive should correctly resolve the 'item' variable from the p-for loop, proving p-for has higher precedence.

assertOnSubExpression.description: Assert that the 'item' variable inside the p-if condition resolves correctly to the loop variable.
